# A Twitter Next Steps

> **The Twitter Loop writes this file (Phase 4) every time you run it.** It's the
> content output — the next tweet(s) to post, copy-paste ready, plus the action
> checklist. Open this second, after `AA_TWITTER_RESEARCH_REPORT.md`.
>
> Workflow: run the **`Refresh Twitter Analysis`** GitHub Action → say **"run the
> twitter loop"** here → read both `AA_` files.

*Seed — not yet generated by a loop run. The structure below is what each run fills in.*

---

## Recommended post
The hero tweet goes here in a copy-paste code block, e.g.:

```
[finished hero tweet — passes both gates + PREMIUM formatting]
```

Then 2–3 sentences on why this one wins right now.

## Alternates
2–3 more tweet/content ideas, each in its own code block.

```
[alternate 1]
```

```
[alternate 2]
```

## RT line
The one standalone quotable line that must appear in the post.

## Action checklist
- [ ] Post the hero now
- [ ] Reply within ~30 min with one extra data point
- [ ] Close the open loop from the last post (result/recap)
